posts.author: allegro23 (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had this formula set up for calculating the remainder balance due after a client has paid the retainer. It had been working fine and then I tried to add another IF statement to the formula and now even after deleting the added IF statement it still doesn’t work. I have a screen shot here. Can anyone see an issue with this formula?

image965×603 59 KB

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @allegro23,

I think you need to remove the closing parenthese immediately after 0.50.

MULTIPLY(0.50,{RTPB})
